title: Operation SOP Begins
description: Pages 11–15 focus on operation sop begins, keeping the Dressrosa conflict centered on the characters active in this scene.
scene: This part follows Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #6, Unknown person #7 as luffy meets Sabo again, entrusts him with the Colosseum fight, and the operation against Doflamingo moves forward.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Damn it!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Hang in there bar- Tolomeo!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Are you just going to miss out on a rare chance like this to speak to the pirate King!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Luffy Senpai,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Ah! Bellamy!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Have you already met zero Senpai...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Damn it!! Such glit- tering aura...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: I don't dare look into his eyes.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Yeah, I saw him,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Thanks!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: He's thanking mee-

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: But right now I have some urgent business and I can't find the exit anywhere.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: There is no exit to the coliseum...!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: Hmm?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: Eh! Your wounds seem to be worse than before?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #16
dialogue.text: Once contestants have entered this coliseum, don't even think about getting out...!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #17
dialogue.text: There's no point looking for an exit....!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #18
dialogue.text: What!!? What's going on with that!!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #19
dialogue.text: None!? No exit!!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #20
dialogue.text: Bellamy... aren't you under dofla- Mingo!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #21
dialogue.text: Then you should know how to get out!? Please tell me, my friends are in danger!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #22
dialogue.text: Under him!? ...I'm not even that yet....!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #23
dialogue.text: I....Am going out...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #24
dialogue.text: If you follow me then maybe you can leave as well.....

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #25
dialogue.text: Is that so, thank you so much!! You really are willing to take me out!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #26
dialogue.text: As I said, it is you who are following me if you manage to get out, it is your luck....!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #27
dialogue.text: Do you want me to be- tray my boss...!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #28
dialogue.text: ...I will never betray Dofla- Mingo.....!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #29
dialogue.text: I still respect him from the bottom of my heart...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #30
dialogue.text: Hey... kid, didn't you just...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #31
dialogue.text: Shut it!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #32
dialogue.text: I have my own print- CIPLES...!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #33
dialogue.text: I under- stand!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #34
dialogue.text: Then we'll follow you,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #35
dialogue.text: But Luffy Senpai, the 'Fire Fruit'...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #36
dialogue.text: I really don't want that bastard to get it....but it can't be helped.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #37
dialogue.text: The lives of my friends are more important!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #38
dialogue.text: Senpai, don't worry!! Leave the 'fire fruit' to me!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #39
dialogue.text: I had planned to give Ace's treasure to you directly,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #40
dialogue.text: When I got it anyway!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #41
dialogue.text: Eh!? Really, giving it to me!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #42
dialogue.text: Of course, it must be in your hands!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #43
dialogue.text: You accent seems to be getting thicker.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #44
dialogue.text: I'll defi- Nitely get the 'Fire Fruit'...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #45
dialogue.text: Is it ok that you're turned around.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #46
dialogue.text: Don't worry and get out of here!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #47
dialogue.text: Really! That's a big help!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #48
dialogue.text: Step

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #49
dialogue.text: The 'Fire Fruit' cannot be given to you 'Strawhat Luffy'.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #50
dialogue.text: Eh!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #51
dialogue.text: Who do you think you are!!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #52
dialogue.text: Speaking to Luffy Senpai Like that!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #53
dialogue.text: This is the brother of the legendary pirate 'Firefist Ace', you know!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #54
dialogue.text: And He will become the future pirate King, you idiot!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #55
dialogue.text: I already know that...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #56
dialogue.text: Hey!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #57
dialogue.text: Acilia has allied with Rebecca and they are unstoppable!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #58
dialogue.text: Keep this up Rebecca!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #59
dialogue.text: Acilia!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #60
dialogue.text: You have to make the final!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #61
dialogue.text: Yeah!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #62
dialogue.text: It makes me angry, this guy pretend-ING to know Luffy Senpai really well.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #63
dialogue.text: You see Senpai is already getting agitated...!

summary: Operation SOP Begins focuses on Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #6 as luffy meets Sabo again, entrusts him with the Colosseum fight, and the operation against Doflamingo moves forward.
